trans-unit.source:
The module offers the creation of a page tree either with TCA demo records or content elements.
In addition, the most well-known backend components that come with the TYPO3 CMS are presented.
trans-unit.target:
Ey, das Modul droppt dir nen Page-Tree mit TCA-Demo-Records oder Content-Elementen.
Plus die krassesten Backend-Components vom TYPO3 CMS werden präsentiert.

trans-unit.source: Interactively explore TYPO3 backend UI components, design tokens, and example page trees for testing and demonstration.
trans-unit.target: Yo, interaktiv TYPO3-Backend-UI-Components, Design-Tokens und Beispiel-Page-Trees zum Testen und Flexen erkunden.
